  - REST principles
---
Internal guidelines for API design. All public APIs should follow these principles.

1. Use noun-based resource names
2. Return consistent error shapes
3. Version all breaking changes
4. Document with OpenAPI spec

See [[decisions/2026-03-01-api-versioning-strategy]] for versioning specifics.
